message:
test(prepared): add thread-safe profile guard and full-reload publication-reuse proof

Introduce HotPathProfileTestGuard that serialises hot-path profile
tests via a static mutex and restores the previous enabled state on
drop, preventing flaky results under --test-threads>1.

Add test_prepared_full_reload_reuses_publication_after_cross_connection_ddl
(bd-db300.4.5.2) proving that a prepared INSERT whose schema was
invalidated by a cross-connection DDL takes the FullReloadRequired
refresh path and reuses the pager publication instead of paying a
second bind during autocommit begin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
